title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Kiku as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is your relation to Kikui? And what the hell did you do to block my harite?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't rip Kiku limb from limb...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right! I'll let you do that, but only if you can beat me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm great at it, after all...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fishing Record: A complete victory over USOPP

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What's that guy thinking!? He'll be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe he's able to dodge urna's harite!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wahaha!! Good luck, ya lil' shrimp!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't win if you keep running away....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey!! Aren't those against the rules!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A woman cut off the Yokozuna's top knot?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and? What the hell do you want me to do about it...?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
